final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a sunlit park scene in peak autumn. A man with curly dark hair, wearing a light blue button-down shirt, beige chinos, and white sneakers, stands smiling directly in the CENTER foreground. Immediately to his right (viewer's right), a golden retriever sits attentively on the grass, its thick fur glowing in warm sunlight. The grass beneath them is partially carpeted with fallen leaves in shades of crimson, amber, and russet; these leaves are especially dense under a large deciduous tree located at the LEFT-center mid-ground, whose canopy blazes with fiery red and golden-yellow foliage. Exactly two classic wooden park benches are visible in the background: one positioned on the LEFT side and one on the RIGHT side, both lightly dusted with scattered leaves. A tall black lamppost anchors the extreme FAR-RIGHT edge of the frame. Beyond the grassy expanse, a calm body of water reflects the pale sky, with a hazy city skyline visible across the shore in the far background. Sunlight streams from the upper left, casting gentle diagonal shadows across the lawn and highlighting the texture of the dry, curled leaves. The overall mood is serene and vividly seasonal. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural autumn colors. Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing forward. Spatial layout verification: Man (Center Foreground), Dog (Right-Center Foreground), Tree (Left-Center Mid-ground), Bench 1 (Left Background), Bench 2 (Right Background), Lamppost (Far-Right Edge), Water/Skyline (Background).
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a sunlit park scene in peak autumn. A man with curly dark hair, wearing a light blue button-down shirt, beige chinos, and white sneakers, stands smiling at CENTER foreground. Beside him, slightly to his right, a golden retriever sits attentively on the grass, its thick fur glowing in warm sunlight. The grass beneath them is partially carpeted with fallen leaves in shades of crimson, amber, and russet, especially dense under the large deciduous tree at LEFT-center, whose canopy now blazes with fiery red and golden-yellow foliage. Two classic wooden park benches sit in the mid-ground — one on the LEFT background, one on the RIGHT background — both lightly dusted with scattered leaves. A tall black lamppost anchors the FAR-RIGHT edge of the frame. Beyond the grassy expanse, a calm body of water reflects the pale sky, with a hazy city skyline visible across the shore. Sunlight streams from the upper left, casting gentle diagonal shadows across the lawn and highlighting the texture of the dry, curled leaves. The overall mood is serene and vividly seasonal, capturing the crisp beauty of an autumn afternoon without altering any human or animal poses, structures, or spatial relationships from the original composition. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural autumn colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing forward toward subject pair centered in frame; Spatial positions: Man CENTER foreground, dog RIGHT-CENTER foreground sitting beside him; tree LEFT-center mid-ground; two wooden benches — one LEFT-background, one RIGHT-background; lamppost FAR-RIGHT edge; water and skyline BACKGROUND. Style reference: Surface materials/textures: short-cut green grass (will be partially covered by dry crinkled leaves), smooth bark on tree trunk, matte fabric of shirt, fluffy dog fur, weathered wood benches; Spatial positions: Man CENTER foreground, dog RIGHT-CENTER foreground sitting beside him; tree LEFT-center mid-ground; two wooden benches — one LEFT-background, one RIGHT-background; lamppost FAR-RIGHT edge; water and skyline BACKGROUND.

constraints: The image is an eye-level photograph with a forward-facing perspective.
The scene depicts a park during peak autumn with vivid seasonal colors.
A man with curly dark hair stands smiling in the center foreground.
The man wears a light blue button-down shirt, beige chinos, and white sneakers.
A golden retriever sits attentively on the grass to the right of the man in the foreground.
The dog's fur appears thick and glowing in warm sunlight.
The grass is partially covered with fallen leaves in shades of crimson, amber, and russet.
A large deciduous tree with fiery red and golden-yellow foliage is located at the left-center mid-ground.
Fallen leaves are especially dense under the large tree.
A classic wooden park bench lightly dusted with leaves is visible in the left background.
A second classic wooden park bench lightly dusted with leaves is visible in the right background.
A tall black lamppost stands at the far-right edge of the frame.
A calm body of water reflecting a pale sky is visible in the background beyond the grass.
A hazy city skyline is visible across the water in the background.
Sunlight streams from the upper left, casting gentle diagonal shadows across the lawn.
The lighting highlights the texture of dry, curled leaves on the ground.
The image style is photorealistic with sharp focus and natural autumn colors.
The spatial relationship places the man and dog in the foreground, the tree in the mid-ground, and benches/water/skyline in the background.
